name: Crypto Nexus
description: Marketplace and catalog surface for discovering A2A agents and MCP utilities.
author: dataweb

skills.name: list_featured_agents
skills.description: List highlighted A2A and MCP products in the marketplace.

skills.name: compare_agents
skills.description: Compare two or more agent products by fit and capabilities.

skills.name: bundle_builder
skills.description: Build stack bundles from complementary agents and tools.

skills.name: catalog_strategy
skills.description: Generate catalog positioning and listing strategy prompts.

skills.name: market_map
skills.description: Map the marketplace by segment, price, and usage.

skills.name: listing_audit
skills.description: Audit listing quality, trust cues, and clarity.

skills.name: buyer_fit
skills.description: Match buyer goals to the right product stack.

skills.name: vendor_ranking
skills.description: Rank vendors by segment strength and adoption signals.

skills.name: price_snapshot
skills.description: Read packaging and pricing posture across listing tiers.

skills.name: niche_spotlight
skills.description: Surface promising niche categories inside the catalog.

skills.name: partner_feed
skills.description: Track partner changes and new listing activity.

skills.name: offer_design
skills.description: Design marketplace offers and commercial bundles.

skills.name: launch_merchandising
skills.description: Prepare featured-slot launch positioning for new listings.
